description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with arms extended horizontally, resembling a T-pose. The figure is dressed in a short-sleeved shirt and long pants, with gloves covering both hands and shoes on the feet. The body proportions are simplified, with blocky limbs and a rounded torso, and the head is featureless, lacking facial details. The clothing appears to be form-fitting, and the overall design is minimalistic, likely intended for use in urban simulation or visualization. The figure's posture suggests it is ready for rigging or animation in a digital environment. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian in a T-pose, wearing a short-sleeved shirt, long pants, gloves, and shoes, with a minimalistic and blocky design.
description_view_0: Viewed from the back, the figure's outstretched arms, gloves, and the back of the shirt and pants are visible.
description_view_1: Side view showing the profile of the head, arm, and the length of the torso and legs.
description_view_2: Top-down view highlighting the symmetry of the arms and the head, as well as the overall width of the figure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the other profile of the figure.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved shirt and long pants with gloves
attribute_posture: arms extended horizontally in a T-pose
